location.trackerconsumer.CfnAbout:
The `AWS::Location::TrackerConsumer` resource specifies an association between a geofence collection and a tracker resource. The geofence collection is referred to as the *consumer* of the tracker. This allows the tracker resource to communicate location data to the linked geofence collection.

**Note**  
Currently not supported — Cross-account configurations, such as creating associations between a tracker resource in one account and a geofence collection in another account.

location.trackerconsumer.ConsumerArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the geofence collection that consumes the tracker resource updates.  + Format example: `arn:aws:geo:region:account-id:geofence-collection/ExampleGeofenceCollectionConsumer`

location.trackerconsumer.TrackerName.Description: The name for the tracker resource.  Requirements:  + Contain only alphanumeric characters (A-Z, a-z, 0-9) , hyphens (-), periods (.), and underscores (_).+ Must be a unique tracker resource name.+ No spaces allowed. For example, `ExampleTracker`.
